---
title: MODULE TITLE
title-block-style: none
teaching: 40        # minutes of teaching
exercises: 40       # minutes of exercises
filters:
  - dynamic-code-output
  - pyodide
  - webr
execute: 
  eval: false 
---



Some stuff



::: callout-task

#### Task 2: Q/A

::: panel-tabset
##### Question

  <iframe src="http://127.0.0.1:7087/?embed=true&type=wordcloud&title=Digital+Tools&question=What+data+tools+do+you+use%3F"
          width="100%" height="600" frameborder="0"></iframe>

##### Follow-up

- Read through what others have shared.  
- Discuss recurring goals and patterns in the group.  
- Identify shared learning priorities.

:::
:::
<iframe src="http://127.0.0.1:7087/?embed=true&type=dropdown&title=Research+Tasks&choices=Teams,Word,SharePoint,RIS,UniCore,OneDrive&question=Which+tools+support+this+task%3F"
          width="100%" height="600" frameborder="0"></iframe>


<iframe src="http://127.0.0.1:7087/?embed=true&type=slider&title=Digital+Security&question=How+secure+is+your+research+environment%3F"
          width="100%" height="600" frameborder="0"></iframe>
